name: Baked Spaghetti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 baking pan with sesame oil.
3. Bake potato for 40 minutes.
4. When cooled, cut into 1/2-inch cubes.
5. Combine all ingredients together in the baking pan.
6. Lower heat to 375 degrees.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
8. Serves 2.
